creator: demelier.david@gmail.com
text:
I made a new little port for the game viruskiller.

Your computer has been invaded! Dozens of little viruses are pouring in via
security holes in Microsoft Internet Explorer, Microsoft Outlook, Microsoft MSN
Messenger and Microsoft Recycle Bin!! Using your trusty mouse you must shoot the
buggers before they can destroy your files! Some will steal them from their home
directories and take them back to their security hole. Others will just eat them
right there on the spot! See how long you and your computer can survive the
onslaught!

WWW:	http://www.parallelrealities.co.uk/projects/virusKiller.php

See the shar file for the port or take it directly from http://files.malikania.fr/viruskiller.shar

Thanks.

Fix: -- shar begins here --


-- shar ends here--dIPNy84FfihJ4jYLPAEyBuKQ3druJ1LFJNWzfdhIOQVd40FM
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.shar"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.shar"

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	viruskiller/
#	viruskiller/Makefile
#	viruskiller/pkg-descr
#	viruskiller/distinfo
#	viruskiller/pkg-plist
#
echo c - viruskiller/
mkdir -p viruskiller/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - viruskiller/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >viruskiller/Makefile << 'e655f2aa7782d1636b90e021b9f16abe'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	viruskiller
X# Date created:				13 Mar 2010
X# Whom:					markand
X#
X# $FreeBSD: ports/games/viruskiller $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	viruskiller
XPORTVERSION=	1.03
XCATEGORIES=	games
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.parallelrealities.co.uk/download/viruskiller/
XDISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-1
X
XMAINTAINER=	markand@malikania.fr
XCOMMENT=	An arcade game that relies on quick reflexes
X
XLICENSE=	GPLv1
X
XUSE_SDL=	mixer image ttf
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XINSTALL_ICONS=	yes
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
X
X# Need to rename makefile to Makefile.
Xpre-patch:
X	@${MV} -f ${WRKSRC}/makefile ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
X
Xpost-patch:
X.if defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s|^.*install.*DOCS.*||g" ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s|^.*mkdir.*DOCDIR.*||g" ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
X.endif
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s|^PREFIX.*|PREFIX=${PREFIX}|g" ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
e655f2aa7782d1636b90e021b9f16abe
echo x - viruskiller/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >viruskiller/pkg-descr << 'd8108c8abc19d7e8d5c0579aea263270'
XYour computer has been invaded! Dozens of little viruses are pouring in via
Xsecurity holes in Microsoft Internet Explorer, Microsoft Outlook, Microsoft MSN
XMessenger and Microsoft Recycle Bin!! Using your trusty mouse you must shoot the
Xbuggers before they can destroy your files! Some will steal them from their home
Xdirectories and take them back to their security hole. Others will just eat them
Xright there on the spot! See how long you and your computer can survive the
Xonslaught!
X
XWWW:	http://www.parallelrealities.co.uk/projects/virusKiller.php
d8108c8abc19d7e8d5c0579aea263270
echo x - viruskiller/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >viruskiller/distinfo << '7b5e742d86f593c9a8a7e4e44ee6701e'
XMD5 (viruskiller-1.03-1.tar.gz) = ac74f8a49d249a87e3e77cadd9aa6fa9
XSHA256 (viruskiller-1.03-1.tar.gz) = c6421df23a5c1f677fa6effc72a4723f913dc08addd48de76ca031bbd6d5bd76

7b5e742d86f593c9a8a7e4e44ee6701e
echo x - viruskiller/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >viruskiller/pkg-plist << '699a54e5955d8073a5afe4a59bcffbb4'
Xgames/viruskiller
Xshare/games/viruskiller/viruskiller.pak
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/LICENSE
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/battery.png
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/bomb.png
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/clock.png
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/manual.html
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/title.png
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/virus1.gif
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/virus2.gif
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/virus3.gif
Xshare/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps/viruskiller.png
Xshare/icons/hicolor/32x32/apps/viruskiller.png
Xshare/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps/viruskiller.png
Xshare/applications/viruskiller.desktop
X%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%

exit
